title: Audit
description: Vendor-adapted `owen-it/laravel-auditing` row. Immutable after write. Primary key stays vendor's bigint auto-increment (no ULID conversion in Wave 6; `aud_` prefix reserved for Wave 7+). Extended with `tenant_id UUID NOT NULL` (backfilled from `new_values.tenant_id` for existing rows), `application_id UUID NULLABLE` (NULL = platform-plane audit), and six composite indexes.

x-eloquent.keyPrefixReserved: aud_ (Wave 7+ redesign; PK stays bigint in Wave 6)
x-eloquent.notes: Extends the vendor `OwenIt\Auditing\Models\Audit` class + adds our BelongsToTenant trait (global scope + auto-fill). Vendor observer AuditableObserver fires on the AUDITED model's save/delete/restore/custom events and writes rows via this model.

id.description: Vendor default. NO ULID conversion in Wave 6.

user_type.description: Polymorphic actor class. Vendor default. NULL for system-fired mutations.

user_id.description: Polymorphic actor ID. Vendor default. Accepts bigint or ULID depending on actor's key type.

event.description: One of vendor defaults (created/updated/deleted/restored) OR a registered custom transition (auth.login, transaction.approved, etc.). See data/audited-events-catalog.json.

old_values.description: Pre-mutation field values. Encrypted at rest via Postgres TDE. RESTRICTED per data-classes.json. Hidden on tenant wire unless caller has audit.audits.reveal_raw_diff permission (writes chain-of-custody meta-audit on reveal).

new_values.description: Post-mutation field values. Same treatment as old_values.

url.description: Request URL when captured. Vendor default. Hidden on tenant wire by default.

ip_address.description: Request IP. CONFIDENTIAL. Hidden on tenant wire unless caller has reveal_raw_diff permission.

tags.description: Comma-separated tags. Vendor default. Consumers use for arbitrary categorization.

tenant_id.description: OUR EXTENSION. ULID (ten_). NOT NULL. Populated by SnapshotApplicationIdOnAuditCreatingHook + AuditObserver::creating from the vendor row's inferred tenant context. Backfilled for pre-existing rows via `audit:backfill-tenant-id`.

foreign.onDelete: no action (see PurgeAuditDataForErasedTenantHook — migrate-to-archive on TenantErased)

application_id.description: OUR EXTENSION. ULID (app_). NULLABLE (NULL = platform-plane audit). Populated by SnapshotApplicationIdOnAuditCreatingHook from the resolved application in the request context.

created_at.description: Vendor default. When the vendor observer wrote the row.

x-database.no_updated_at_note: Vendor's `audits` table has NO updated_at column — audit rows are immutable after write, so 'updated_at' would never legitimately change. AuditObserver::updating throws NOTIFICATIONS_AUDIT_ROW_IMMUTABLE.

indexes.name: audits_tenant_created_idx
indexes.description: OUR EXTENSION. Primary tenant-dashboard read path.

indexes.name: audits_app_tenant_created_idx
indexes.description: OUR EXTENSION. Cross-tenant platform-admin queries scoped to one application.

indexes.name: audits_event_tenant_created_idx
indexes.description: OUR EXTENSION. Filter by event type (auth.login rollups, transaction.approved rollups).

indexes.name: audits_tenant_auditable_created_idx
indexes.description: OUR EXTENSION. 'All Membership audits for tenant X in the last 30 days' — common compliance-dashboard read path.

is_immutable.description: Computed. Always true — audit rows are immutable after write.

diff_summary.description: Computed. { changed_fields: string[], change_count: int }. Redacts values; safe for tenant wire even without reveal_raw_diff.

notes: old_values + new_values are REDACTED by default. ?include=raw_diff reveals them for callers with audit.audits.reveal_raw_diff permission + writes a chain-of-custody meta-audit row on every reveal.
ip_address + user_agent + url are HIDDEN on tenant wire. Revealed only under reveal_raw_diff permission (compliance-officer role) — helpful for forensic reconstruction.
Audit is READ-ONLY over HTTP. No PATCH/DELETE/POST routes on /audits — enforced by AuditPolicy at the policy layer AND audit.enforce_read_only middleware at the request-parsing layer.

layers: AuditObserver::deleting throws NOTIFICATIONS_AUDIT_ROW_DELETE_FORBIDDEN unless caller is PurgeExpiredAuditsJob (config.audit.immutability.forbid_delete_outside_purge = true).
audit.enforce_read_only middleware refuses non-GET on /audits* routes (config.audit.immutability.enforce_read_only_middleware = true).
Postgres DB triggers refuse UPDATE + DELETE outside a session tagged with the purge service actor (deployment-time enforcement — see database/migrations/audit_immutability_triggers.php).
